properties.description: INNER JOIN employees.json + departments.json on department_id → SELECT → SQL TRUNCATE+LOAD

typeProperties.script:
source(output(
	employee_id as integer,
	employee_name as string,
	department_id as integer
),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	format: 'single',
	filePattern: 'employees.json',
	documentForm: 'documentPerLine') ~> EmployeesSource
source(output(
	department_id as integer,
	department_name as string
),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	format: 'single',
	filePattern: 'departments.json',
	documentForm: 'documentPerLine') ~> DepartmentsSource
EmployeesSource, DepartmentsSource join(EmployeesSource@department_id == DepartmentsSource@department_id,
	joinType:'inner',
	broadcast: 'auto')~> InnerJoin
InnerJoin select(mapColumn(
		employee_id,
		employee_name,
		department_id,
		department_name = DepartmentsSource@department_name
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> SelectColumns
SelectColumns sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	deletable:false,
	insertable:true,
	updateable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	recreate:true,
	format: 'table',
	store: 'sql',
	stagedCopy: false,
	mapColumn(
		employee_id,
		employee_name,
		department_id,
		department_name
	)) ~> SqlSink
